name: golang-github-emirpasic-gods-dev
title: golang-github-emirpasic-gods-dev
summary: Implementation of various data structures and algorithms in Go
description:
Implementation of various data structures and algorithms in Go
GoDS (Go Data Structures):
- Containers (Sets, Lists, Stacks, Maps, Trees),
- Sets (HashSet, TreeSet, LinkedHashSet),
- Lists (ArrayList, SinglyLinkedList, DoublyLinkedList),
- Stacks (LinkedListStack, ArrayStack),
- Maps (HashMap, TreeMap, HashBidiMap, TreeBidiMap, LinkedHashMap),
- Trees (RedBlackTree, AVLTree, BTree, BinaryHeap),
- Comparators,
- Iterators,
- …
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-emirpasic-gods-dev because Implementation of various data structures and algorithms in Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-emirpasic-gods-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-emirpasic-gods-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-emirpasic-gods-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
